summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for BTTS detection fix and Over Support P1 features. All 71 tests passed (18 API tests + 19 BTTS unit tests + 16 Over Support unit tests + 18 live recommendation history unit tests). Mexico vs Serbia backfill event verified. All endpoints working correctly with no regressions.
passed_tests: Login with demo@valuebet.app credentials
Mexico vs Serbia backfill event verified (ID: 277b754d-7ebe-42e6-8a51-ec2893b129ad, status=hit, normalized_market=BTTS_YES, settled_score=1-1)
normalize_live_market_label detects BTTS YES from 'BTTS (Ambos marcan)', 'Ambos equipos marcan', 'Both teams to score', bare 'BTTS'
normalize_live_market_label detects BTTS NO from 'BTTS NO', 'Ambos equipos no marcan'
normalize_live_market_label detects Over 1.5, 2.5, 3.5 from 'Más de X.5 goles', 'Over X.5'
normalize_live_market_label detects Under 1.5, 2.5, 3.5 from 'Menos de X.5', 'Under X.5'
Manual event creation with BTTS detection (normalized_market=BTTS_YES)
Manual event creation with Over 2.5 detection (normalized_market=OVER_2_5)
Manual event creation with Under 3.5 detection (normalized_market=UNDER_3_5)
Manual event creation with BTTS NO detection (normalized_market=BTTS_NO)
Manual event creation with Over 1.5 detection (normalized_market=OVER_1_5)
Manual event creation with Under 2.5 detection (normalized_market=UNDER_2_5)
Manual event creation with 'Both teams to score' English detection (normalized_market=BTTS_YES)
GET /live/recommendation-events with status=hit filter (9 events found, all verified)
GET /live/recommendation-events with result=hit filter (9 events found, all verified)
GET /live/recommendation-events with source=manual filter (10 events found, all verified)
GET /live/recommendation-events with settled=true filter (10 events found, all verified)
GET /live/recommendation-events with limit=5 parameter (5 events returned)
Fail-soft with invalid payload (422 validation error returned correctly)
settle_live_event_from_score with normalized_market=BTTS_YES and score 1-1 → result=hit
settle_live_event_from_score with normalized_market=BTTS_YES and score 0-1 → result=pending
settle_live_event_from_score with normalized_market=BTTS_YES and score 0-1 match_ended=True → result=miss
settle_live_event_from_score with normalized_market=OVER_2_5 and total=3 → result=hit
settle_live_event_from_score with normalized_market=UNDER_3_5 and total=3 match_ended=True → result=hit
settle_open_live_events_for_match auto-settles BTTS YES from 0-1 to 1-1 → status=hit
Hit events remain hit when new recommendation is persisted (superseded_by_event_id link only)
is_total_line_already_hit with score 1-1 → True for Over 0.5 and Over 1.5, False for Over 2.5 and Over 3.5
select_football_market Over 1.5 selected when sup_15>=70 and fragility<=60
select_football_market Over 2.5 selected when sup_25>=80, fragility<=45, lambda_total>=2.85, early_goal>=60
select_football_market Over 2.5 downgraded when fragility>45 (RC_OVER_2_5_FRAGILE + RC_OVER_2_5_DOWNGRADED_TO_OVER_1_5)
select_football_market dc_nb_under_3_5>=0.70 blocks Over 2.5 (RC_DC_NB_UNDER_CONFLICT)
select_football_market CONTROLLED_MATCH_BLOCKS_OVER blocks any Over (RC_OVER_BLOCKED_BY_CONTROLLED)
select_football_market TOP_SCORER_OUT_WEAKENS_OVER blocks Over 2.5 (RC_OVER_BLOCKED_BY_INJURY)
select_football_market INJURY_DEFENSE_WEAKENED_OVER_SUPPORT boosts Over 1.5 (RC_OVER_DEFENSE_INJURY_BOOST)
select_football_market Over line already hit blocks recommendation (RC_OVER_LINE_ALREADY_HIT)
No regression: /picks/today?sport=football returns 200 OK
No regression: /football/pattern-memory/summary returns 200 OK
No regression: /football/totals-calibration/summary returns 200 OK
